message:
feat(trace): add trace event filtering for selective recording [bd-jyy5]

Implement comprehensive trace filtering to reduce trace size:

- EventCategory enum for grouping events (Scheduling, Time, I/O, etc.)
- Include/exclude filtering by event category
- Region and task entity filtering
- Sampling for high-frequency events (RNG, Waker)
- Custom predicate support for advanced filtering
- Predefined filters: scheduling_only(), no_rng(), io_focused()
- FilterBuilder for fluent API integration

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
